reservationSettings.description: Configure which day-reservation requests parents can submit for this location, and how they're handled.
reservationSettings.modeDisabledHint: Parents can't submit this request type.
reservationSettings.modeInformationalHint: Parents submit; it's automatically approved, you're just notified.
reservationSettings.modeApprovalHint: You review and approve or reject each request.
reservationSettings.noticeHoursHint: Parents must submit at least this many hours before the requested day. 0 means no minimum.
reservationSettings.saveError: Couldn't save changes. Please try again.
reservationSettings.warningBody: This location has pending requests that this change won't automatically resolve — you'll need to handle them manually from the Requests queue.
reservationSettings.warningCounts: {absence} absence, {extra} extra day, {exchange} exchange request(s) affected.

checkInSettings.description: Decide whether caregivers must enter their code when checking in or out at this location.
checkInSettings.tradeoffIdentity: Turning this off means a caregiver's identity at check-in/out will no longer be confirmed by anything beyond their own card tap.
checkInSettings.tradeoffRisk: Concrete risk: if a caregiver taps the wrong card by mistake, nothing catches it. The only fix is someone noticing and correcting the check-in/out afterward.
checkInSettings.saveError: Couldn't save changes. Please try again.

qrCheckInSettings.description: Let parents at this location check in or out by showing a code on their phone instead of a caregiver tapping the roster.
qrCheckInSettings.explanationAdds: When enabled, parents can show a code in the parent app for a caregiver's tablet to scan, as an alternative to the manual attendance tap.
qrCheckInSettings.explanationUnchanged: The caregiver still physically receives the child — the handover itself doesn't change, only how the attendance record gets created.
qrCheckInSettings.saveError: Couldn't save changes. Please try again.

menuVariants.description: Offer an alternative monthly menu per dietary restriction, alongside this location's base menu. Enable the ones you offer, and order them by priority for a child who qualifies for more than one.

menuVariants.duplicateDietaryType: Each dietary type can only be enabled once.
menuVariants.warningTitle: This variant is currently visible to families
menuVariants.warningBody: Removing this will switch affected children back to their next resolution option (another enabled variant, or the base menu) the next time they view it.

invoiceSettings.description: Configure the details printed on this location's invoices and how many days families have to pay.
invoiceSettings.invoiceDueDaysHint: Counted from the day an invoice is sent, not when it's generated.
invoiceSettings.saveError: Couldn't save changes. Please try again.

siblingBilling.discountHint: Applied automatically to every child but the earliest-enrolled sibling sharing the same primary contact at this location.
